---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a Bot API method to wrap or an improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like slackctl to do?**
Describe the workflow or Bot API method you want supported.

**Why**
What you're trying to accomplish, and why the existing commands or `slackctl api` don't fit.

**Notes**
Links to the relevant [Bot API docs](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api) if applicable.
